sqlMap.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.name, p.category, SUM(oi.qty) AS total_qty, SUM(oi.qty * oi.unit_price) AS total_amount FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN product_option po ON oi.option_id = po.option_id JOIN product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 2 GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name, p.category ORDER BY total_qty DESC, total_amount DESC LIMIT #topN#
SELECT o.order_date, COUNT(*) AS order_cnt, SUM(o.total_price) AS sales_amount FROM orders o WHERE o.status = 2 GROUP BY o.order_date ORDER BY o.order_date DESC

SELECT p.seller_name, SUM(oi.qty * oi.unit_price) AS gross_amount, SUM( (oi.qty * oi.unit_price) * CASE p.category WHEN 'ELECTRONICS' THEN 12 WHEN 'ACCESSORY' THEN 8 WHEN 'HOME' THEN 10 WHEN 'FASHION' THEN 15 WHEN 'SPORTS' THEN 10 WHEN 'BOOKS' THEN 5 ELSE 10 END / 100 ) AS commission, SUM( (oi.qty * oi.unit_price) - (oi.qty * oi.unit_price) * CASE p.category WHEN 'ELECTRONICS' THEN 12 WHEN 'ACCESSORY' THEN 8 WHEN 'HOME' THEN 10 WHEN 'FASHION' THEN 15 WHEN 'SPORTS' THEN 10 WHEN 'BOOKS' THEN 5 ELSE 10 END / 100 ) AS payout FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN product_option po ON oi.option_id = po.option_id JOIN product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 2 GROUP BY p.seller_name ORDER BY payout DESC
